part1_recruiting_rules.name: Gayatri Iyer
part1_recruiting_rules.title_snippet: Gayatri Iyer - Talent Acquisition Expert @ Google Cloud | LinkedIn Hiring for AI/ ML Talent, Security Engineers , Distributed Systems engineers & Engineering Leadership. ... Operated as a full lifecycle Recruiter for Google Cloud Platform (Oct 2015- Dec 2018), Android & Chrome (Mar 2014 - Sep 2015) & Sourcing ...
part1_recruiting_rules.message_300:
Hi Gayatri Iyer,  
I hope you’re doing well. I’m ABC, a software developer with X years of experience at XYZ and currently pursuing my MS in Computer Science at Rutgers University. I recently applied for a Software Engineer role at Google because the work strongly aligns with my experience building full-stack applications and AI-driven solutions.  

If possible, I would truly appreciate it if you could take a look at my application. If you think my experience aligns with what you are looking for, I'd love to chat about the position as soon as you are available. If not, please guide me on who I should connect with for this role. I’d be very excited about the opportunity to contribute.  

Thank you for your time. I’d be glad to stay connected.  

Best regards,  
ABC  
abc@gmail.com

part2_senior_engineers_rules.name: Alex Tessmer
part2_senior_engineers_rules.title_snippet: Alex Tessmer - Software Engineer - Network Virtualization | LinkedIn United States · Connect · Senior Staff Software Engineer / Tech Lead Manager at Google · Mountain View, CA · Connect · Cross-platform apps expert - Flutter, Swift/SwiftUI · Los Angeles, CA · Connect · San Francisco Bay Area · Connect · Seattle, WA ·
part2_senior_engineers_rules.message_300:
Hi Alex Tessmer,  
I hope this isn’t too random. I’m currently exploring opportunities as a software developer at Google. Since you are part of the team, I was wondering if you could please share some tips on navigating the hiring process or maybe even refer me. Thank you for your time. Your guidance would mean a lot to me.  
  
A bit about me: I’m pursuing my MS in Computer Science at Rutgers University and previously worked for X years at XYZ, building full-stack systems and applied AI solutions, including recent work evaluating LLM reasoning frameworks.  
  
Thank you so much for your time. I’d truly value your guidance.  
  
Best regards,  
ABC
